name: io.github.stockmarketscan/earningscalls-mcp
title: EarningsCalls.dev
description: AI access to 177,000+ earnings call transcripts (17,000+ companies, 70 countries, 2020-present) with role-tagged speaker segments and full-text search.

environmentVariables.name: EARNINGSCALLS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your EarningsCalls.dev API key (ect_...). Paid plan required; get one at https://earningscalls.dev/#pricing

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Your EarningsCalls.dev API key (ect_...). Paid plan required.
